title: UPI Payment Integration for WooCommerce
description: Direct UPI gateway extension for WooCommerce merchants in India, enabling QR-code based instant checkout.
outcome: Acquired by a commercial WordPress product company for ₹150,000 following user adoption.

title: Razorpay Payment Links for WooCommerce
description: Extension that automatically generates and emails Razorpay payment links for WooCommerce orders.
outcome: Grew active merchant base and successfully positioned the product for acquisition, selling it for ₹150,000.

title: WP Last Modified Info
description: WordPress plugin designed to easily display the last modified time/date of posts, pages, and templates.
outcome: Over 1,000,000+ lifetime downloads, maintained on WordPress.org with mostly 5-star ratings.

title: RevivePress
description: WordPress scheduler helper to automatically republish old content, driving fresh search engine traffic.
outcome: Actively maintained on WordPress.org, helping thousands of blogs maintain automated workflows.

title: Gutena Blocks & Theme
description: A high-performance modular Gutenberg block layout system and custom block theme.
outcome: Acted as lead developer, building 10+ custom blocks and setting up the core layout system.

title: Projectopia
description: Top-selling project management solution for WordPress clients.
outcome: Contributed core modules, refactored backend logic, and resolved payment integration bugs.

title: Responsive Menu
description: WordPress menu customization plugin with highly responsive layout controls.
outcome: Maintained plugin, patched security vulnerabilities, and added modern CSS grids features.

title: Quiz And Survey Master (QSM)
description: Popular quiz and survey building extension with complex scoring add-ons.
outcome: Developed specific add-on modules and stabilized reporting dashboards.

title: Connect Helpers
description: Reusable PHP package providing streamlined WooCommerce database sync helpers.
outcome: Authored and managed package releases in Composer repository.

title: Ultimate Facebook Comments
description: Allows integrating Facebook comment moderation threads directly into post layouts.
outcome: Successfully maintained with 5-star ratings on official repository.
